content:
- `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed after the new `docs/setup_sql/` guides landed. The normal test lane skipped the ignored long-lane tests as expected, so I did not run `make test-long`.
- Updated the task file to `completed` with `<passes>true</passes>` and checked every acceptance box, then ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, which updated the Ralph ledgers and sent the completion email.
- Next I am staging the full worktree, committing with the required task-finished message including test evidence, and pushing the branch.
